airtable.notes: Higher threshold (7) than KRONOS (5) due to competitive Italian solar market

warmupPlan.rationale: New .it domain requires gradual warm-up for deliverability

complianceNotes.unsubscribe: Mandatory unsubscribe link for bulk emails
complianceNotes.company_registration: Consider adding Italian company number in signature

openrouter.rationale: Handles Italian text well; cost-effective for volume

temperature.rationale: Consistency for technical solar market (higher than KRONOS's optional 0.6)
temperature.testing: Monitor first 20 emails; if < 10% open rate, increase to 0.6

llm_tuning.languageHandling: Italian-first if lead is Italy-based; bilingual support

lead_filtering.notes: Company Type affects tone (installer = technical, distributor = business, energy firm = enterprise)

workflow_defaults.langPriority: Italian for Italian leads, English fallback

email_prompt.systemMessage: You are a cold email specialist writing on behalf of HELIOS Energy Solutions.
email_prompt.targetMarket: Italian solar installation companies and energy firms

contentProtocol.hook: Reference specific achievement or project in their region (Italian context)
contentProtocol.problem: Lead generation cost, seasonal revenue, long sales cycles
contentProtocol.solution: Automate first contact so installers focus on closing deals, not hunting

data_isolation.critical: HELIOS and KRONOS must have ZERO data crossover
data_isolation.enforcement: Every n8n workflow must query only its own base ID

airtable.node: Get Leads from Airtable + Update Airtable nodes (HELIOS)
airtable.action: Create separate credential for HELIOS Airtable

openrouter.action: Use existing credential or create HELIOS-specific one

brevo.node: Send Email via Brevo + Error Alert nodes
brevo.action: Create separate credential for HELIOS Brevo API key

airtable_prepared: Leads table created with required fields
brevo_configured: API key created with SMTP permission

key_differences_from_kronos.problem_hook: Lead gen cost, seasonality (vs KRONOS warm leads)

deployment_notes.domain_setup: SPF/DKIM/DMARC must be configured for heliosbusiness.it
deployment_notes.warm_up_mandatory: Cannot skip warm-up; new .it domain has lower initial reputation
deployment_notes.first_run: Start with leadLimit: 1, then 5, then full batch
